## PerformanceProfiler.profileConcurrency() method

Profile concurrent operations

**Signature:**

```typescript

        results: T[];
        totalDuration: number;
        averageDuration: number;
        concurrentStats: ReturnType<PerformanceProfiler['getStats']>;
    }>;
```
